description:
A new way to collaborate

Empowering teams by messenger, meetings, calendar, docs, and emails. It's all in one place.
Settings
- When you adjust the text size in the General settings of the Feishu mobile app, the text size across all pages such as chats, Docs, Sheets, Base, web pages, mini-programs, Calendar, Meetings, and emails opened in the mobile app will update simultaneously. This ensures a more consistent appearance and a more comfortable reading experience.
